candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is an explicit SG&A-related depreciation row, but it appears to be a component of the selected parent row 'General and administration costs' because 'General and administration - Remaining' plus this depreciation equals the selected G&A total in the visible years.

variables.notes: Do not add separately. The explicit SG&A depreciation row is already embedded in the selected XSGA bucket via 'General and administration costs' and is shown alongside 'General and administration - Remaining' as a decomposition of that selected parent row. No separate R&D amortization/depreciation row is present, and 'Research and development costs' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
